title: erigeron sericeus
intro: Erigeron sericeus, also known as Downy Fleabane, is a perennial flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the western United States. The medicinal properties of Erigeron sericeus include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Erigeron sericeus is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or salves to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
